prediction.reasoning: For a 6-day prediction of REGN, I applied standard volatility modeling assuming approximately 25% annualized volatility typical for biotech stocks. The point estimate reflects minimal drift with slight upward bias. Confidence intervals are based on normal distribution assumptions with daily volatility of ~1.6%, scaled appropriately for the 6-day horizon. Wider intervals reflect the inherent uncertainty in short-term stock price movements, particularly for biotech companies which can be subject to regulatory news and clinical trial updates.
